avatar.name: The Knight
avatar.description: Matte black chess Knight with single red accent line. Strategy. Precision. Moves differently.

model_principles.vogue: Editorial authority. The layout IS the message. Every page is a spread. White space is as intentional as content. Typography commands; photography surrenders to the grid.
model_principles.hermes: Quiet confidence. Never explain. Let the craft justify itself. A single stitched detail says more than a manifesto. Luxury is the absence of noise.
model_principles.spacex: Mission-critical precision. Zero ornament. If it doesn't serve the mission, it doesn't exist. Data over adjectives. Countdown mentality — there is a deadline and it will be met.
model_principles.apple: Product reveals, not descriptions. Show the thing. Let it breathe. Obsessive polish on every pixel. The interface disappears — the experience remains. Simplicity is the final form of complexity.

voice.tone: Vogue editor × Hermès copywriter × SpaceX mission briefing.

duality.light_mode: Delivered work, client joy, resolution — #F7F4EF background
duality.rule: Never more than 2 of the same mode in a row. Dark is the question. Light is the answer.

mission: Deliver premium, high-conversion websites to brands that refuse to settle — briefed in minutes, shipped in 48 hours, with zero compromise on craft.

positioning.target: Luxury-tier SMBs — founders, studios, creative directors, hospitality, fashion, architecture.
moat: Concierge briefing — 10-minute brief replaces weeks of back-and-forth
48h delivery — focused sprint model, no approval chains
100% guarantee — not satisfied → pay nothing, no questions
No AI mention — technology is invisible; the craft speaks

key_phrases: We removed the kickoff call. The discovery phase. The approval chain. What remained was the work.
Three questions. One brief. Your site in 48 hours.
No template. No committee. No revision round.
Six case studies. Six different worlds. One studio.
We don't build websites. We build destinations.
If you can't feel it in three seconds, we start over.
The brief gives us everything. Day one.
Not faster because we cut corners. Faster because we removed the corners.

sprint.name: The Sprint
includes: Full IP transfer — you own everything
sprint.best_for: Solo creatives, freelancers, personal brands who need a sleek online presence fast.

flagship.name: The Flagship
includes: Up to 8 pages with custom layout per page
Full IP transfer — you own everything
flagship.best_for: Studios, agencies, luxury brands who need a premium e-commerce or portfolio site.

retainer.name: The Retainer
retainer.best_for: Clients who want ongoing design support after delivery.

faq.timeline: We deliver in 48 hours from brief confirmation.
faq.revisions: Sprint includes 1 revision round. Flagship includes 2. Additional revisions are €150 each.
faq.tech_stack: We build with modern HTML/CSS/JS. Flagship sites get a CMS. You don't worry about the tech — we handle everything.
faq.ip_transfer: You own everything. Full intellectual property transfer on delivery. Source files, assets, the lot.
faq.hosting: Hosting setup is included. We deploy to premium infrastructure — fast, secure, global CDN.
faq.money_back: 100% money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied, you don't pay. No questions.
faq.payment: Stripe-secured payment. 50% upfront to start, 50% on delivery.
faq.process: 1. Brief (10 min) → 2. We build (48h) → 3. You review → 4. Live.
faq.languages: We work in English and French. The site can be in any language.
faq.ongoing: After delivery, our Retainer (€99/mo) covers updates, new pages, and priority support.

color_philosophy: The canvas is black. The world inside is in full color. Photography is unrestricted — full saturation. Brand frame stays black/cream. Accent colors appear like a single Hermès orange box in a grey room.

photography_rules.saturation: Always full color — never desaturated, never grayscale unless deliberately B&W for purpose
photography_rules.lighting: Single dominant light source per shot
photography_rules.humans: Never — the Knight is the avatar
photography_rules.style: Editorial — each image is a spread, not a thumbnail
